title: SECTION 8 HOUSING CHOICE VOUCHER PROGRAM - 211info
text: WEST VALLEY HOUSING AUTHORITY SECTION 8 HOUSING CHOICE VOUCHER PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about Section 8 housing and takes complaints about the program. 204 SW Walnut Avenue Dallas, OR 97338 Eligibility: Income must be at or below 50% of Area Median Income Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm Email (503) 623-8387 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 623-8387 TTY/TDD (800) 735-2900 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for an application FEES: No fees for applying. Rent varies by rental site. DOCUMENTS: Proof of income and Social Security card LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Polk County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located off Kings Valley Highway 223, North of Rickreall Creek Services: Housing Complaints * Section 8 Housing Residents Section 8 Housing Choice Vouchers Section 8/Rental Assistance Program Rental Listings Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - PUBLIC HOUSING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WEST VALLEY HOUSING AUTHORITY
